description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in Softbiz Image Gallery allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) id parameter in image_desc.php, (2) provided parameter in template.php, (3) cid parameter in suggest_image.php, (4) img_id parameter in insert_rating.php, and (5) cid parameter in images.php.
